title: Better 16.5
description: Minecraft 1.16.5 But with optimization mods and a bunch of other stuff.
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/addd8528dbbfe22ff891c006be2e6f338ca0eb51.png)
# Minecraft 1.16.5 But with optimization mods and a bunch of other stuff.

## Stuff:
- A bunch of optimisation mods so it should run good
- Pre Deepslate minecraft
- Quality of life mods
- World Generation Mods
- And much more!

Oh yeah and this has some cool shaders too lol.

# You need to run this pack whtih java 17 or later whtih some kind of ignore java incompatibility setting.
